api.name: CapgoFilePickerPlugin
api.docs: Capacitor File Picker Plugin interface for selecting files, images, videos, and directories.

methods.name: pickFiles

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options for picking files

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the picked files

tags.name: example

methods.docs: Pick one or more files from the device.

methods.name: pickImages

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options for picking images

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the picked images

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Pick one or more images from the gallery.
Android/iOS only.

methods.name: pickVideos

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options for picking videos

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the picked videos

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Pick one or more videos from the gallery.
Android/iOS only.

methods.name: pickMedia

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options for picking media

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the picked media files

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Pick one or more images or videos from the gallery.
Android/iOS only.

methods.name: pickDirectory

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the picked directory path

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Pick a directory from the device.
Android/iOS only.

methods.name: convertHeicToJpeg

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options for the conversion

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the converted file path

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Convert a HEIC image to JPEG format.
iOS only.

methods.name: copyFile

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options for copying the file

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves when the copy is complete

tags.name: example

methods.docs: Copy a file to a new location.

methods.name: checkPermissions

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the permission status

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Check broad storage or media permission state.
Picker-only flows should not gate `pickFiles()`, `pickImages()`,
`pickVideos()`, or `pickMedia()` on this permission on Android 13+.
Android only.

methods.name: requestPermissions

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the permission status

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Request broad storage or media permissions.
Do not request or declare `READ_MEDIA_IMAGES` or `READ_MEDIA_VIDEO`
only to use picker APIs. Google Play allows these permissions only
when picker alternatives are not sufficient for core app functionality.
Use `@capgo/capacitor-file-picker` picker methods instead for
user-selected file, image, or video access.
Android only.

methods.name: addListener

tags.name: param
tags.text: eventName - The event name

tags.name: param
tags.text: listenerFunc - The listener function

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the listener handle

methods.docs:
Add a listener for the picker dismissed event.
iOS only.

methods.name: removeAllListeners
methods.docs: Remove all listeners for this plugin.

methods.name: getPluginVersion

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves with the plugin version

tags.name: example

methods.docs: Get the native Capacitor plugin version.

properties.name: files
properties.docs: Array of picked files

properties.name: name
properties.docs: The name of the file

properties.name: path
properties.docs: The path to the file

properties.name: mimeType
properties.docs: The MIME type of the file

properties.name: size
properties.docs: The size of the file in bytes

properties.name: data
properties.docs:
The base64 encoded data of the file.
Only present if readData was true.

properties.name: blob
properties.docs:
The Blob instance of the file.
Web only.

properties.name: width
properties.docs: Width in pixels (images/videos only)

properties.name: height
properties.docs: Height in pixels (images/videos only)

properties.name: duration
properties.docs: Duration in seconds (videos only)

properties.name: modifiedAt
properties.docs: Last modified timestamp in milliseconds

properties.name: types
properties.docs:
List of accepted MIME types or file extensions.
On iOS, only MIME types are supported.
Examples: ['image/*'], ['application/pdf'], ['.pdf', '.doc']

properties.name: limit
properties.docs:
Maximum number of files to pick.
Set to 0 for unlimited (platform default).

properties.name: readData

tags.text: false
tags.name: default

properties.docs:
Whether to read the file data as base64.
Note: Reading large files may cause memory issues.

properties.name: limit
properties.docs:
Maximum number of files to pick.
Set to 0 for unlimited (platform default).

properties.name: readData

tags.text: false
tags.name: default

properties.docs:
Whether to read the file data as base64.
Note: Reading large files may cause memory issues.

properties.name: skipTranscoding

tags.text: false
tags.name: default

properties.docs: iOS only: Skip transcoding of videos.

properties.name: ordered

tags.text: false
tags.name: default

properties.docs: iOS 15+ only: Show ordered selection badges.

properties.name: path
properties.docs: The path to the selected directory

interfaces.name: ConvertHeicToJpegResult
interfaces.docs: Result of HEIC to JPEG conversion.

properties.name: path
properties.docs: The path to the converted JPEG file

interfaces.name: ConvertHeicToJpegOptions
interfaces.docs: Options for converting HEIC to JPEG.

properties.name: path
properties.docs: The path to the HEIC file to convert

properties.name: quality
properties.docs: The compression quality for JPEG (0.0 - 1.0).

properties.name: from
properties.docs: Source file path

properties.name: to
properties.docs: Destination file path

properties.name: overwrite

tags.text: false
tags.name: default

properties.docs: Whether to overwrite if destination exists.

properties.name: readExternalStorage
properties.docs:
Whether broad external storage or media permission is granted.
Picker APIs that return user-selected files usually do not require this on Android 13+.

properties.name: accessMediaLocation
properties.docs: Whether permission to access media location is granted

typeAliases.name: PickerDismissedListener
typeAliases.docs: Listener callback for picker dismissed event.
